description_long: This office building features a modern, rectilinear design with a strong emphasis on horizontal and vertical lines. The facade is dominated by large, blue-tinted glass windows arranged in a grid pattern, separated by metallic or concrete structural elements. The building is composed of several stacked sections, each slightly offset, creating a tiered appearance with prominent ledges between floors. The exterior is primarily gray with blue highlights, giving it a sleek, contemporary look. The base of the building is wider, suggesting a lobby or entrance area, while the upper floors are more uniform. No visible signage or decorative elements are present, emphasizing a functional, corporate aesthetic.
description: A modern, tiered office building with blue-tinted glass windows and a gray, metallic facade, featuring stacked sections and a sleek, corporate appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tiered structure, prominent blue-tinted windows, and the wide base suggesting the main entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the ledges between floors and the consistent window pattern across the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the same stacked sections and window arrangement, but less emphasis on the entrance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the building's layered design and regular window spacing.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular, horizontal bands of large rectangular windows separated by vertical and horizontal mullions, repeated uniformly across each floor.
